title: Cinematographer's Pumpkin (Black Bars)
description: Apply black bars (letterboxing) when using carved pumpkins!
body:
![Project banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TdeCOfE/images/cd6b2a1f2485e071a946fbe63de949828dc60e81.png)

**Cinematographer's Pumpkin** is a resource pack that adds black bars (letterboxing) to the screen when wearing carved pumpkins instead of the default pumpkin overlay. This makes the game feel more cinematic in those intense moments, such as fighting the Ender Dragon or wandering around in Enderman infested parts of the Nether. Furthermore, it's perfect for taking a step back and admiring your new-built home. The letterboxing uses a 2.40:1 aspect ratio—one common in the film industry.

**View the gallery to see the resource pack in use.**
